issues.title: Xss in app.php
issues.description:
在app/app.php文件的media case块中，$_GET['file']参数未经转义直接拼接到alert消息中。alert()函数将消息存储到session，alerts()函数从session读取并输出到HTML时未对消息文本进行HTML编码，导致反射型XSS。攻击者可构造恶意URL如/admin?page=media&action=delete&file=<script>alert(document.cookie)</sc

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意 URL，诱使管理员点击，从而窃取管理员会话 cookie、执行任意操作或进行钓鱼攻击。由于漏洞在管理后台，影响更为严重。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: $file = ( $_GET[ 'file' ] ?? '' );
污点在此传播/转换: $this->alert( sprintf( 'File %s has been deleted successfully.', $file ), 'success' );

污点在此传播/转换: public function alert( string $message, string $type = 'info' ): void {
    $alert = array( 'message' => $message, 'type

危险操作在此触发: $result .= '

' . $alert[ 'message' ] . '

';

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取 app/app.php 文件确认漏洞代码存在（第 990-995 行）。2. 分析 alert() 和 alerts() 函数实现（第 335-361 行），确认消息未进行 HTML 编码。3. 使用 Python 编写模拟测试，验证 XSS payload 会原样输出到 HTML 中。4. 确认 alerts() 在 layout.php 中被调用，确保漏洞可触发。

issues.title: Xss in lgsl_list.php
issues.description:
The application uses the HTTP Referer header value directly without proper sanitization, allowing attackers to inject JavaScript code that gets reflected in the HTML response. The $uri variable is assigned from $_SERVER[

Impact: Attackers can execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the victim's browser, leading to session hijacking, credential theft, defacement, or other malicious actions. The vulnerability is reflected and requires user interaction (clicking a malicious link or visiting a page with a malicious Referer).

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: $gamelink= lgsl_build_link_params($uri, array("game" => $server['s']['game']));
危险操作在此触发: <a href='{$gamelink}'>

issues.ai_explanation: Read the target file lgsl_files/lgsl_list.php and related function lgsl_build_link_params in lgsl_files/lgsl_class.php. The code shows that $uri is assigned from $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] or $_SERVER['HTTP_REFERER'] without validation. This variable is passed to lgsl_build_link_params, which performs no HTML encoding. The returned string is directly inserted into href attributes (lines 58, 115, 120) without escaping. A Python simulation of the function demonstrated that XSS payloads (e.g., " onmouseover="alert(1) or javascript:alert(1)) survive the processing and appear in the final HTML, leading to reflected XSS.

issues.title: Xss in list.js
issues.description:
The WebFeed browser extension contains multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities via innerHTML assignments with unsanitized RSS feed data. Attackers can craft malicious RSS feeds containing JavaScript payloads

Impact: 高危 - 扩展上下文XSS。攻击者可以在chrome-extension://上下文中执行任意JavaScript，可以访问扩展API（browser.runtime, browser.storage），读取/修改其他RSS feed数据，进行网络请求，并可能提升权限。

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: $("article>h2").innerHTML = entry.title;
危险操作在此触发: sum.innerHTML = entry.summary;
危险操作在此触发: $("article>.meta a.site").innerHTML = site;

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 确认文件js/list.js存在并包含报告中的代码
2. 确认存在多个innerHTML赋值使用未净化的用户数据（entry.title, entry.summary, site）
3. 确认数据源来自RSS feed解析（js/feed.js），无输入验证
4. 确认所谓的净化函数html2txt在innerHTML赋值之后调用，且其实现有问题（使用innerHTML = innerText）
5. 确认没有其他有效的输入验证或输出编码机制

issues.title: CVE-2022-0224: Dolibarr SQL注入漏洞
issues.description: 在 htdocs/compta/sociales/list.php 中，用户输入的 search_users 参数未经任何过滤直接拼接到 SQL 查询中，导致 SQL 注入漏洞。攻击者可以通过控制 search_users 参数注入恶意 SQL 代码，可能执行任意 SQL 查询，导致数据泄露、数据篡改或数据库服务器被控制。

issues.title: Command Injection in up_helper.py
issues.description:
The merge_splitted_archives function in up_helper.py constructs a shell command using f-string interpolation without proper sanitization. The 'path' and 'user_id' parameters are directly inserted into the command string, leading to command injection vulnerability.

Impact: If the merge_splitted_archives function is called with attacker-controlled parameters, arbitrary command execution is possible. This could lead to complete system compromise, data theft, or further network penetration. The function executes commands with the privileges of the application process.

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: async def merge_splitted_archives(user_id, path):
    cmd = f'cd "{path}" && cat * > MERGED_{user_id}.zip'
    await run
Nodes.code:
async def merge_splitted_archives(user_id, path):
    cmd = f'cd "{path}" && cat * > MERGED_{user_id}.zip'
    await run_shell_cmds(cmd)

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: cmd = f'cd "{path}" && cat * > MERGED_{user_id}.zip'
危险操作在此触发: await run_shell_cmds(cmd)

issues.ai_explanation: Extracted the merge_splitted_archives function and created a Fuzzing Harness that mocks run_shell_cmds to detect when malicious commands would be executed. Tested multiple payloads including: path with command separators (;), command substitution ($()), backticks (`), pipes (|), AND operators (&&), and quote escaping attacks. All malicious payloads successfully bypassed the double-quote protection and would execute arbitrary commands if the function is called.

issues.title: CVE-2024-53262: SvelteKit error.html template XSS vulnerability
issues.description: The error.html template in SvelteKit uses the placeholder %sveltekit.error.message% which is replaced with user-controlled error messages without proper HTML escaping. This allows attackers to inject arbitrary JavaScript code into the error page, leading to cross-site scripting (XSS) when the error page is rendered in a victim's browser. The vulnerability exists in the template replacement logic in write_server.js where message is directly concatenated into the HTML string.

}

issues.title: Python Code Injection via eval() in SagemakerLLM.complete()
issues.description: The complete() method in SagemakerLLM class uses eval() to parse string response from a remote AWS SageMaker LLM endpoint. An attacker who can control the response from the SageMaker endpoint (e.g., through model poisoning) can execute arbitrary Python code on the server.

危险操作在此触发: response_dict = eval(response_str)

issues.title: Path Traversal in VocableTrainerProvider.java
issues.description:
VocableTrainerProvider 的 openFile 方法直接使用 Uri.getLastPathSegment() 构造文件路径，未对路径进行验证或净化。由于该 ContentProvider 在 AndroidManifest.xml 中配置为 exported="true"，其他应用可通过构造包含 ../ 序列的 URI 访问缓存目录外的任意文件，导致敏感信息泄露。

Impact: 攻击者可读取设备上的任意文件，包括：1. 系统敏感文件(/etc/passwd, /proc/self/environ)；2. 其他应用数据(/data/data/<package>/shared_prefs/)；3. 用户私有文件。由于ContentProvider exported=true，任何应用均可利用此漏洞。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: public ParcelFileDescriptor openFile(Uri uri, String mode) throws FileNotFoundException {
Nodes.code: public ParcelFileDescriptor openFile(Uri uri, String mode) throws FileNotFoundException {

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: File privateFile = new File(cacheDir, uri.getLastPathSegment());
危险操作在此触发: return ParcelFileDescriptor.open(privateFile, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY);

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 使用Python编写Fuzzing Harness模拟openFile方法逻辑，测试多种路径遍历payload；2. 确认5/9个测试payload成功逃逸缓存目录；3. 验证AndroidManifest.xml中ContentProvider配置为exported="true"；4. 代码分析确认无输入验证机制。

issues.title: Sql Injection in WebplayerController.java
issues.description:
The getByMovieIdAndUsername method in ReviewServiceImpl.java directly concatenates user-controlled movieId and username parameters into SQL query without parameterization, allowing SQL injection attacks. The vulnerabilit

Impact: High impact SQL injection vulnerability. Attackers can: 1. Bypass authentication by injecting always-true conditions, 2. Extract sensitive data from database using UNION queries, 3. Modify or delete database records, 4. Potentially execute database-specific commands leading to full system compromise.

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: String username = session(Application.USERNAME_KEY);
污点在此传播/转换: Review review = Factories.businessFactory.getReviewService().getByMovieIdAndUsername(movie.getId(), username);
危险操作在此触发: return find.where("movieId = " + movieId + " and username = '" + username + "'").findUnique();
Nodes.code: return find.where("movieId = " + movieId + " and username = '" + username + "'").findUnique();

issues.ai_explanation: Extracted the vulnerable getByMovieIdAndUsername method from ReviewServiceImpl.java and created a Java Fuzzing Harness that mocks the database layer. Tested multiple SQL injection payloads including: 'admin' OR '1'='1', 'admin' OR '1'='1'--, 'admin' UNION SELECT * FROM users--, '; DROP TABLE reviews; --. The harness successfully detected SQL injection patterns in the constructed queries, confirming the vulnerability exists.

issues.title: Code Injection in math.py
issues.description:
The math command in commands/math.py directly evaluates user-provided expressions using Python's eval() function without any sanitization. The eval() function executes arbitrary Python code from user input, allowing remote code execution.

Impact: Full remote code execution on the server hosting the Discord bot. Attackers can execute arbitrary system commands, read/write files, install backdoors, establish reverse shells, and completely compromise the server. The bot runs with the privileges of the user executing it, which could be root or a privileged service account.

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: async def math(ctx, expression):
危险操作在此触发: response = str(eval(expression))

issues.ai_explanation: Created a Fuzzing Harness to test eval() function with various malicious payloads. Successfully demonstrated that eval() executes arbitrary Python code including: 1) __import__('os').system('id') - executed system command, 2) open('/etc/passwd').read() - read sensitive file, 3) Various other code injection payloads. The vulnerability allows full remote code execution on the server hosting the Discord bot.

issues.title: Path Traversal in AbstractUnArchiver.java
issues.description:
符号链接目标路径未经验证，可能导致任意文件创建漏洞。extractFile方法中，symlinkDestination参数直接用于创建符号链接，未检查是否指向解压目录之外的位置。虽然第295-302行有路径遍历检查，但仅针对entryName，不适用于symlinkDestination。

Impact: 攻击者可以创建恶意压缩文件，包含指向系统任意文件的符号链接。当文件被解压时，会在解压目录中创建指向敏感文件（如/etc/passwd、/etc/shadow、配置文件等）的符号链接。如果应用程序后续读取这些符号链接，可能导致敏感信息泄露。在特定条件下，如果应用程序有写权限，可能通过符号链接覆盖系统文件。

        if (ze.isUnixSymlink()) {

                SymlinkUtils.createSymbolicLink(targetFileName, new File
危险操作在此触发: SymlinkUtils.createSymbolicLink(targetFileName, new File(symlinkDestination));

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取并分析了AbstractUnArchiver.java的extractFile方法，确认第295-302行只检查了entryName的路径遍历，而第315-316行直接使用symlinkDestination创建符号链接，未进行验证。2. 编写了Python Fuzzing Harness模拟符号链接创建逻辑，测试了多种恶意路径（../../etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, subdir/../../../etc/passwd等），确认可以创建指向解压目录外的符号链接。3. 分析了TarUnArchiver.java和AbstractZipUnArchiver.java，确认符号链接目标来自不可信的压缩文件。

issues.title: SQL注入漏洞在ClienteDAO.java的多个搜索方法中
issues.description: ClienteDAO.java 中的多个搜索方法使用字符串拼接构建SQL查询，将用户输入直接嵌入SQL语句中，然后通过PreparedStatement.executeQuery()执行，导致SQL注入漏洞。虽然使用了PreparedStatement，但没有使用参数占位符（?），而是将用户输入直接拼接到SQL字符串中。受影响的方法包括：buscarFuncionarioNome(第273行)、buscarFuncionarioCPF(第305行)、buscarFuncionarioEmail(第336行)、buscarClienteNome(第366行)、buscarClienteCPF(第398行)、buscarClienteEmail(第429行)。攻击者可以通过控制输入参数（nome、cpf、email）注入恶意SQL代码，可能导致数据泄露、数据篡改或数据库服务器被控制。

issues.title: Path Traversal in lsf_runner.py
issues.description:
The extract_packages_archive function extracts a tar archive without validating the destination paths of extracted files. An attacker can craft a malicious tar archive containing files with absolute paths or paths with '..' sequences to write arbitrary files outside the intended directory.

Impact: 攻击者可以创建恶意tar文件，导致任意文件写入到系统任意可写位置，可能：1. 覆盖关键系统文件导致服务中断；2. 写入后门或恶意代码；3. 泄露敏感信息；4. 提升权限。

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: def extract_packages_archive(work_dir):
    package_file = os.path.join(work_dir, "packages.tar")
    if not os.path.exi

危险操作在此触发: for tarinfo in tar:
        tar.extract(tarinfo)

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取lsf_runner.py文件确认函数存在；2. 分析代码发现使用tarfile.extract()循环提取文件而没有路径验证；3. 编写Fuzzing Harness测试，创建包含路径遍历文件名（../outside.txt）的恶意tar文件；4. 测试确认函数成功提取并写入到工作目录外的位置；5. 验证了Zip Slip漏洞确实存在且可被利用。

issues.title: Ssrf in LinkReferenceProvider.php
issues.description:
LinkReferenceProvider 在获取 OpenGraph 数据时，首先对用户提供的 URL 执行 HEAD 请求检查 Content-Length，如果超过 5MB 则跳过。然而，恶意服务器可以在 HEAD 响应中返回小的 Content-Length（如 1KB），但在随后的 GET 请求中返回非常大的响应体（如 5GB）。这导致服务器将整个响应体读入内存（第145行），造成内存耗尽拒绝服务。此外，loadHtml()

Impact: 高危 - 攻击者可通过恶意服务器导致目标服务器内存耗尽，造成拒绝服务。同时存在SSRF风险，可攻击内网服务。实际影响取决于服务器内存配置：小型服务器(1-2GB)立即崩溃，中型服务器(4-8GB)内存压力巨大，大型服务器(16-32GB)内存使用激增影响其他服务。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: public function resolveReference(string $referenceText): ?IReference {
污点在此传播/转换: $headResponse = $client->head($reference->getId(), [ 'timeout' => 10 ]);

污点在此传播/转换: $linkContentLength = $headResponse->getHeader('Content-Length');
		if (is_numeric($linkContentLength) && (int)$linkConte
污点在此传播/转换: $response = $client->get($reference->getId(), [ 'timeout' => 10 ]);
危险操作在此触发: $responseBody = (string)$response->getBody();

issues.ai_explanation: 通过编写Python测试代码模拟漏洞逻辑，验证了恶意服务器可以在HEAD响应中返回小Content-Length(1KB)，在GET响应中返回大响应体(5GB)。代码分析确认：1)第117行执行HEAD请求，2)第124行检查Content-Length，3)第139行执行GET请求，4)第145行读取整个响应体到内存。攻击者可利用此漏洞导致服务器内存耗尽拒绝服务。
